landing.heroSubtitle: Practice with multi-language question banks, detailed explanations, and smart progress tracking. Everything you need to ace your AWS, Azure, or GCP certification exam.
landing.certSubtitle: Prepare for the most popular cloud certifications from major providers.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Powerful tools designed to make your certification preparation efficient and effective.
landing.feature1Desc: Study in your preferred language. Switch between languages anytime to better understand each question.
landing.feature2Desc: Every question comes with a thorough explanation — understand why the correct answer is right and why others are wrong.
landing.feature3Desc: Automatically track your mistakes. Review and retry wrong answers to strengthen your weak areas.
landing.feature4Desc: Monitor your study progress and accuracy rate in real-time. Know exactly where you stand before exam day.
landing.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to certification success.
landing.step1Desc: Select the cloud certification exam you want to prepare for — AWS, Azure, or GCP.
landing.step2Desc: Work through questions in order or by category. Read detailed explanations to deepen your understanding.
landing.step3Desc: Review your wrong answers, master every topic, and walk into the exam room with confidence.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Login for 1 free question bank. Donate to unlock more.
landing.pricingNote: All donations support our mission. Pay with card.
landing.testimonialsSubtitle: See what our users are saying about their certification journey.
landing.faq1A: CloudCert is designed for anyone preparing for cloud certification exams, whether you're a beginner aiming for your first certification or an experienced professional pursuing advanced certifications. Our platform supports AWS, Azure, and GCP certification preparation.
landing.faq2Q: What's included in the free plan?
landing.faq2A: The free plan includes 10–20 practice questions per certification, complete with detailed explanations, a wrong answer notebook, and progress tracking. It's a great way to get started and see if CloudCert is right for you.
landing.faq3Q: Where do the questions come from?
landing.faq3A: Our questions are carefully crafted by certified cloud professionals and regularly reviewed to align with the latest exam objectives. They cover all domains and knowledge areas required for each certification.
landing.faq4A: CloudCert supports multiple languages for both the user interface and question content. You can switch between languages at any time while studying, making it easier to understand complex concepts in your preferred language.
landing.faq5Q: How do I unlock more question banks?
landing.faq5A: Donation options will be available soon. Once launched, you can choose Thanks ($4.99), Support ($9.99), or Sponsor ($49.99) for a one-time donation to unlock more banks. Payments are processed securely through Stripe.
landing.faq6Q: Is the question bank updated regularly?
landing.faq6A: Yes! We continuously update our question bank to reflect the latest exam objectives and real-world scenario changes. Donors get access to new questions in their unlocked banks.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of learners who have passed their cloud certification exams with CloudCert.
landing.ctaNote: No credit card required · Free questions included
landing.waitlistSuccessDesc: We'll notify you as soon as CloudCert launches.
landing.waitlistAlreadyJoined: You've already joined — we'll be in touch!
landing.waitlistError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
